default.contactSub: Whether you're looking for a senior PM or a consulting partner, I'd love to hear what you're building.
default.metaDescription: Principal Product Manager with 9+ years across B2C and B2B at scale. Led product at Lloyds Banking Group, Wagamama and HCA Healthcare. Based in London.

au.contactSub: I'm relocating to Sydney in October 2026 and talking to teams now about what's next. If you're building something worth working on, I'd love to hear about it.
au.metaDescription: Principal Product Manager with 9+ years across B2C and B2B at scale. Led product at Lloyds Banking Group, Wagamama and HCA Healthcare. Relocating to Sydney from October.
